package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for malformed_struct_tag: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Struct field tags that do not parse as valid Go tag key/value pairs.
type CaseMalformedStructTagDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMalformedStructTagModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMalformedStructTagRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMalformedStructTagModel
}

type CaseMalformedStructTagService struct {
    repo *CaseMalformedStructTagRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMalformedStructTagAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveMalformedStructTag(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMalformedStructTagDTO) error {
    focus := "malformed_struct_tag"
    _ = focus
    type MalformedTag struct { ID string `json:"id" binding` }
    _ = MalformedTag{}
    malformed_struct_tag_positive := map[string]int{"malformed": 1, "struct": 2, "tag": 3}
    malformed_struct_tag_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    malformed_positive_0 := malformed_struct_tag_positive["malformed"] + len(input)
    _ = malformed_positive_0
    struct_positive_1 := malformed_struct_tag_positive["struct"] + len(input)
    _ = struct_positive_1
    tag_positive_2 := malformed_struct_tag_positive["tag"] + len(input)
    _ = tag_positive_2
    return nil
}
